data.body:
Insert two new states between review and shipped in loom/execution_plan_sdlc/workflow.loom:

  * ready_for_orchestration (queue) — knot has passed review and is waiting to be orchestrated.
  * orchestration (action) — agent-produced step that drives the execution plan forward (output: note, or a new output kind if needed).

Flow becomes: ready_for_design -> design -> ready_for_review -> review -> ready_for_orchestration -> orchestration -> shipped.

Scope:
  * Edit loom/execution_plan_sdlc/workflow.loom to add an orchestrate action and an orchestration_phase (or extend authoring_phase) so the new queue/action pair is wired in.
  * Rebuild the bundle so loom/execution_plan_sdlc/dist/bundle.json reflects the new states, steps, and phase.
  * Update profiles (autopilot, semiauto) to include the new phase/executor assignment as appropriate (autopilot: agent orchestrates; semiauto: agent orchestrates, human still reviews).
  * Any prompts needed for the new action go under prompts/ and are referenced from the workflow.

Out of scope:
  * Changes to Rust (those are covered by db35 which removes the hardcoded KnotState enum).
data.title: Add ready_for_orchestration and orchestration states to execution_plan_sdlc workflow
